name: sevyn-skills
description: Sevyn AI internal skills marketplace. Autonomous content operations across Amara, The Town Weekly, Brnstak, and Slumbiq brands.

plugins.name: amara-content-pipeline
plugins.description: Full content pipeline for @amara.stx. Voice writing, Soul 2.0 prompt construction, and Blotato scheduling for IG, TikTok, and Twitter. Use whenever the user wants to generate, draft, or schedule content for Amara across any social platform.

name: slumbiq-pipeline
description: End-to-end carousel pipeline for @slumbiq, the ambient sleep YouTube channel. Selects template, writes on-brand slide copy, renders branded 1080x1350 Instagram and 1080x1920 TikTok slides with vignetted thumbnails, and schedules cross-platform posts via Blotato. Triggers automatically after each YouTube upload via marker queue. Use whenever Slumbiq video uploads complete or carousel work signals appear.
